name: Gold Fields Limited
description: Gold Fields Limited is a globally diversified gold producer with nine operating mines and one project in Australia, Chile, Ghana, Peru, and South Africa. Headquartered in Johannesburg, the company focuses on sustainable gold mining and maintains a significant production profile supported by high-quality ore bodies. Gold Fields is committed to environmental stewardship and social responsibility, aiming to be the global leader in sustainable gold mining while delivering superior value to its stakeholders through efficient operations and strategic growth initiatives.
